description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these Yacht  lifestyle shoes from timberland. This shoe is a fresh take on the classic design and looks cool both on the yacht and off it.UpperSuede upper for comfort and protectionCentral leather lace-ups for snug FitLeather lining for greater comfortFabric lining for breathable comfortCushioned insole for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for comfort and stabilityOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heelAggressive lugs on the forefoot and heelShoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
